mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_seckill_mq_fail_log (user_id, goods_id, msg_content, error_msg, retry_count, handle_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{msgContent}, #{errorMsg}, #{retryCount}, #{handleStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, goods_id, msg_content, error_msg, retry_count, handle_status, create_time, update_time FROM t_seckill_mq_fail_log WHERE handle_status = 0 AND retry_count < #{maxRetry} ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 100
